q2.text: Meetings are usually a waste of time.

q3.text: Remote work makes people less productive.

q5.text: Deadlines improve the quality of work.

q7.text: A 4-day work week would increase productivity.

q9.text: Listening to music while working improves focus.

q10.text: A good manager is more important than a high salary.

q11.text: Managers should be friends with their employees.

q12.text: Employees should be able to give anonymous feedback about their managers.

q13.text: Managers should share company financial information with employees.

q14.text: Leadership skills are more important than technical skills.

q15.text: Employees should be involved in decision-making.

q16.text: Company culture is more important than salary.

q18.text: Teamwork is more important than individual performance.

q21.text: Employees should be allowed to make mistakes.

q23.text: Meetings should never be longer than 30 minutes.

q24.text: Honest feedback is more important than being polite.

q26.text: Everyone should keep their camera on during online meetings.

q28.text: Job satisfaction is more important than salary.

q29.text: It is better to be a specialist than a generalist.

q30.text: Salary should be public within a company.

q31.text: Meetings should be banned one day per week.

q32.text: Managers don’t need to be experts in the work they manage.

q33.text: Hard work is more important than talent.

q34.text: Employees should be allowed to work whenever they want as long as work gets done.

q35.text: Office work will disappear in the future.

q36.text: Being busy does not mean being productive.

q37.text: The best ideas usually don’t come from managers.

q38.text: Remote workers are more productive than office workers.

q40.text: Dancing in public is totally acceptable if you hear a good song.

q41.text: You can never have too many throw pillows.

q42.text: Talking to pets is a normal form of conversation.

q43.text: Breakfast food is acceptable at any time of day.

q44.text: Singing in the shower should be considered an Olympic sport.

q45.text: Socks with sandals are a crime against fashion.

q46.text: Selfies are a form of modern art.

q47.text: Watching a movie alone is better than with a crowd.

q48.text: Bubble wrap is one of life's greatest joys.

q49.text: Chocolate ice cream is superior to vanilla.

q50.text: Wearing pajamas all day is a valid life choice.

q51.text: Laughing at your own jokes is mandatory.

q53.text: You should clap when the plane lands.

q54.text: Cats are secretly plotting world domination.

q55.text: You can't have too many mugs.

q56.text: Karaoke is more fun when nobody judges.

q57.text: Board games are better than video games.

q58.text: Life would be better if we all carried tiny party hats everywhere.
